# Helix - The Ultimate Utility Modpack
Helix is a comprehensive utility modpack designed to enhance your Minecraft experience by blending performance optimizations with quality-of-life improvements. Helix offers a curated selection of mods that ensure a smoother, more immersive gameplay without straying from the vanilla essence.

## Features:

- **✅ Performance Enhancements:**
Integrates cutting-edge mods such as Sodium, Lithium, and FerriteCore to boost FPS and reduce lag, ensuring a seamless gaming experience.

- **🎨 Visual Improvements:**
Incorporates subtle visual tweaks, including connected textures and enhanced animations, to enrich the game's aesthetics while maintaining its original charm.

- **🔄 Quality-of-Life Additions:**
Features mods like MiniHUD and AppleSkin to provide players with valuable in-game information, enhancing gameplay without altering core mechanics.

- **🔧 Customization and Compatibility:**
Designed to be lightweight and compatible with most setups, Helix allows players to further customize their experience by adding or removing mods as desired.

Embark on a refined Minecraft journey with Helix, where performance meets elegance, and every block feels just right.



## Support
If you have any problems, ideas, or other feedback about this project, please contact me via discord or email. You can contact me on Discord by sending a friend request, so you can send me a message.

Discord: _mazen15
